---
hub_index: false
title: "GC DFO Salmon Ontology"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---

This site no longer mirrors ontology guidance.

Use the canonical sources instead:

- Formal ontology docs (WIDOCO): <https://w3id.org/gcdfo/salmon>
- Contributor conventions: <https://github.com/dfo-pacific-science/dfo-salmon-ontology/blob/main/docs/CONVENTIONS.md>
- Term request process: <https://github.com/dfo-pacific-science/dfo-salmon-ontology/blob/main/docs/SUBMIT_REQUESTS_README.md>

If you're working from a salmon data package workflow rather than editing the ontology itself, use:

- Reusing standards + finding terms: <https://dfo-pacific-science.github.io/metasalmon/articles/reusing-standards-salmon-data-terms.html>
- Quickstart: <https://dfo-pacific-science.github.io/metasalmon/articles/metasalmon.html>
- Publishing/review workflow: <https://dfo-pacific-science.github.io/metasalmon/articles/data-dictionary-publication.html>

The FADS Open Science Hub keeps this page only so older links still land somewhere sensible.
